scripts.prepare: node -e "if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' && !process.env.CI) { try { require('child_process').execSync('cd .. && npx husky vocabulary-app/.husky', {stdio:'inherit'}) } catch(e){} }"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build:backend: npm install --include=dev && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
